description: Use this API to change the table name of the specified non-conventional source fault contribution table in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.2.0. ierr = mbidncs(name, namnew)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the ncsfcc table for which the ncsfcc table name is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: namnew
parameters.description: New name to be assigned to the ncsfcc table. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
